AdminCategories.js implements iconPickerTab state for Library/Custom tab switching
Library tab has search input (iconLibraryQuery) and tag filters (iconLibraryTag) working correctly
Icon selection updates form.icon_svg and shows live preview via CategoryIconSvg component
CategoryIconSvg.jsx includes isSafeCategoryIconSvg() for XSS protection (script, on* handlers, javascript:, foreignObject blocked)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Hybrid icon picker fully implemented and tested. Two tabs: (1) Library - 40 approved icons with search + tag filters, (2) Custom SVG - textarea for manual SVG entry. Backend stores only icon_svg field, no icon_key stored. CategoryIconSvg component used across admin list, public category navigator, sub-category blocks, and listing category selection.
